role: Nurturing the Life Force through diet and lifestyle
treePosition: Practiced last, per the workbook's explicit instruction that the sequence ends with Geb.
teachingNotes: Cultivation of a healthy diet and lifestyle corrects imbalance in your Life Force, which is the key factor in "mind over matter" ability.
Nurturing the Ra (Kundalini, Life Force) to repair, awaken, and expand brain and organ function.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being empowered through happiness over the physical realm.
Mind over matter has been verified scientific over the ages. I place in my spirit, one with God, my trust for success, and wellbeing.
I take neither gain nor loss to heart. Endless joy in Peace Forever is my nature.
Thank you God for the opportunity to learn that the challenges in my life are necessary and unavoidable for the realization of my divinity.
